_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to transfer movement strategies we already know to new and different activities.

_source.w: We are learning to transfer movement strategies we already know to new and different activities.
y: Strategy transfer shows deep understanding of how movement works.
Using familiar strategies in new situations makes us more effective participants.
This skill makes learning new sports and activities faster.
eg: Applying a defensive strategy from basketball to a different invasion game.
Using spacing principles from one game to improve performance in another.
Transferring a striking strategy from cricket to baseball.
Applying teamwork strategies from one context to a new group activity.
Recognising when a familiar strategy needs modification for a new situation.
Discussing how understanding general principles helps us across many sports.
